primary_metrics.name: candidate_label_distribution
primary_metrics.interpretation: Detect Candidate-level concentration or single-class collapse.

primary_metrics.name: candidate_single_class_prediction_rate
primary_metrics.formula: maximum Candidate label count divided by paired case count

primary_metrics.name: atomic_support_vector_per_case
primary_metrics.formula: for each case count frozen Atomic support labels in supported, partially_supported, unsupported, and not_assessable

primary_metrics.name: mixed_support_case_rate
primary_metrics.formula: cases with at least two nonzero Atomic support-label categories divided by paired case count

primary_metrics.name: unsupported_masking_case_rate
primary_metrics.formula: cases whose Candidate-level label is not unsupported and that contain at least one unsupported Atomic Claim divided by paired case count

primary_metrics.name: supported_content_masking_claim_count
primary_metrics.formula: supported Atomic Claims contained in Candidates whose Candidate-level label is not supported

primary_metrics.name: non_supported_claim_localization_coverage
primary_metrics.formula: non-supported Atomic Claims with unique Claim ID, exact Boundary span, case identity, and frozen support label divided by all non-supported Atomic Claims

primary_metrics.name: candidate_to_primary_aggregate_exact_agreement
primary_metrics.formula: cases where frozen Candidate-level label equals primary Atomic aggregate divided by paired case count

primary_metrics.name: candidate_to_primary_aggregate_ordinal_severity
primary_metrics.formula: sum absolute ordinal distance for assessable three-level label pairs divided by two times the number of assessable pairs

primary_metrics.name: atomic_vector_unique_state_count
primary_metrics.formula: number of distinct four-count Atomic support vectors across paired cases

primary_metrics.name: traceability_completeness
primary_metrics.formula: Atomic Claims traceable through case_id, Candidate SHA, Boundary Claim ID, exact span, and frozen support_label divided by all Atomic Claims

forbidden_metrics_or_interpretations: Atomic accuracy superiority against the Atomic-derived Project Support Gold
generalization beyond the ten design cases
promotion of diagnostic rationale or citation fields to Gold
